Usage: ploy config gitlab <command>

Commands:
  show [--cluster-id <id>]                                       Display the current GitLab configuration
  set --file <path> [--cluster-id <id>]                          Apply a GitLab configuration JSON file
  validate --file <path>                                         Validate a GitLab configuration without saving
  status [--limit <n>] [--cluster-id <id>]                       Inspect signer health and recent rotation audit entries
  rotate --secret <name> --api-key <token> [--cluster-id <id>]   Rotate a GitLab secret and trigger node refresh
